allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('@phosphor-icons/react'\); const names = ['Star','NavigationArrow','Flag','PersonSimpleWalk','Flame','MapPinSimple','Compass','Mountain']; names.forEach\(n => console.log\(n, !!p[n]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('@phosphor-icons/react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(p\).filter\(k => /star|pin|walk|fire|flag|mount|compass|nav/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\)")
